articles.title: US courts dismiss manipulation allegations involving Bitcoin Cash
articles.description: US courts dismissed an antitrust lawsuit that alleged prominent investors and individuals schemed to hijack the Bitcoin Cash network, the world’s thirteenth largest crypto network by market cap.

articles.title: Ethereum Back Above $2,000 as Market Rally Continues
articles.description: Ethereum has hit $2,000 for the second time in its history. Ethereum’s Price Rally After a week of green candles for Ethereum, the second-ranked cryptocurrency is trading back above $2,000. Source: TradingView ETH first crossed $2,000 on Feb. 20 after weeks of upward movement. The high didn’t last long, though: it was trading just above $1,300 by the end of the month.
